zh.lifeSummary: Gerard de Furnival是Gerard de Furnival和Matilda FitzWalter的兒子，於1175年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾。他與Maud Luvetot結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1219年享年44歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾沃可索普。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Furnival
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman: locative name from Fourneville (Calvados), Fournival in Saint-Just-en-Chaussée (Oise), or Fournival in Saint-Julien-sur-Sarthe (Orne).

nameMeanings.name: Gerard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + hard ‘brave, hardy, strong’. In the later Middle Ages this was a more common name than Gerald , with which it was sometimes confused. Nowadays it is less common, surviving mainly among Roman Catholics, in honour of the many saints of this name.

variants.name: Gerrard
meanings: Variant spelling of   Gerard  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Jerrard
meanings: Rare variant spelling of   Gerard  , probably influenced by the form of the modern surname, if not a transferred use.

en.lifeSummary: Gerard de Furnival was born in 1175, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Gerard de Furnival and Matilda FitzWalter. He married Maud Luvetot. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1219, at the age of 44, and was buried in Worksop, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Gerard de Furnival est né en 1175, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Gerard de Furnival et Matilda FitzWalter. Il a épousé Maud Luvetot. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1219, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Worksop, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gerard de Furnivalは1175年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでGerard de FurnivalとMatilda FitzWalterの息子として生まれた。Maud Luvetotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1219年に44歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアウオルクソップにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gerard de Furnival(은)는 1175년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Gerard de Furnival(와)과 Matilda FitzWalter의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Maud Luvetot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1219년 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 워크소프에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Gerard de Furnival родился в 1175 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Gerard de Furnival и Matilda FitzWalter. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud Luvetot. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1219 г. в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности ворксоп, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.
